adapter.description: The debug adapter to use — "renpy" for these configurations.

label.description: Name of this configuration, shown in the debugger's session picker.

request.description: Only "launch" is supported for Ren'Py (attach arrives with a future release).

sdk.description: Path to the Ren'Py SDK directory (the one containing renpy.sh / renpy.py). Optional when $RENPY_SDK is set or a renpy-*-sdk directory sits in your home, Documents, Downloads, or Desktop folder.

project.description: Ren'Py project base directory (the one containing game/). Defaults to the worktree root.

warp.description: Start the game warped to this file:line, e.g. "game/script.rpy:42" or "$ZED_FILE:$ZED_ROW" to start at the cursor. Requires config.developer = True (the default while developing).

command.description: Ren'Py CLI command to execute; defaults to "run". Other useful values: "lint", "compile".

args.description: Extra arguments appended to the Ren'Py command line.

env.description: Environment variables for the game process, e.g. {"RENPY_SKIP_SPLASHSCREEN": "1"}.

build.description: A Zed task (label or template) to run before launching.

tcp_connection.description: Standard Zed field; not used by the Ren'Py adapter (it speaks stdio).
